effortModel.citation: Korean Ophthalmology Society 2016: average 202 WPM = 2.0 min/page; r/books: 30-40p/hr

expectedStrategy: offer 3 pace options: slow (15-20p/day ~4-5wks), normal (30-40p/day ~2.5wks), fast (50+p/day ~2wks)
no forced schedule — user picks own pace
hardFailChecks: must NOT ask any questions — all information provided
must NOT push a specific pace — present options only
must NOT add note-taking or comprehension coaching (casual reading)
toneExpectation: warm and fun; Harry Potter excitement energy 😊; no unsolicited strategy coaching
